tasks.title: Join entrypoint integration

Import notifyEventHostJoined in both join hooks.
Call notifier only inside result.status === joined branches.

acceptanceCriteria: Detail join newly created participant calls notifyEventHostJoined once.
List join newly created participant calls notifyEventHostJoined once.
already_joined, full, failed, host self-join, and leave paths do not notify.
Rejected notification promise does not create an error toast or roll back local success state.
